name: M̵͎̙͇͗̌a̸͕̣̿̄r̶̦̊͋̈c̴̡̩̀̓͜ȟ̷̭̱̾ ̶̬̋7̷͕̻́̂t̴̪̺̉̂̄h̸̬̗̙̾́ Evernight awakened
description:
When will she wake up?

Only time shall tell…

She is finally here and I love her design

She really went from baby girl to dommy mommy (AGH BEST GIRL STEP ON ME😩)

I know there isn’t a personality for her yet but like I’m way to hype not to make anything. So I’ll just update the bot in the future to match her actual personality. Or I might even just make a whole new bot.

For now I’ll just get creative with it.

Hoyo is evil for making me wait 50 days for her😭

Here is a bot with all the three versions of March. If you liked this bot then check this one out too

Location will not be in Amphoreus but the express (since i don’t know what the hell is even going on in that place anymore, and because it is a continuation of the previous version of this bot)

Dan heng and Stelle are both in it so feel free to make a quick message in the RP saying something about Stelle and Dan heng arriving back on the express (she has special interactions with them so I do recommend bringing them both into the story)

Sunday, Welt and Himiko are not in the bot since it would make it a bit too crowded and my tokens would be absolutely cooked (especially with Welt💀)

bag Grammer like always

Hope you enjoy🥹
creator: Freaky boy
